source.description: A reviewed six-panel marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent upright cartoon thumbs-up hand on warm paper, drawn as the hand itself with no sticker border, badge frame, face, lettering, or extra prop.

process_strategy: The contact sheet locks one palm, wrist, raised thumb, and four light folded-finger guides first, wraps the unified hand silhouette around them, clarifies only the visible front-over-back divisions, adds the cuff and small emphasis rays, then inks and colors established shapes before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: upright wrist, palm, thumb axis, and four folded-finger guides
final_elements.description: Light construction blocks fix the vertical wrist, rounded palm, tall thumb direction, and four stacked rounded guides inside one compact folded-finger envelope.

final_elements.name: raised-thumb hand silhouette with visible folded fingers
final_elements.description: A chunky outer contour joins the wrist, palm, raised thumb, thumb web, and the visible outside edges of four folded fingers.

final_elements.name: clarified finger divisions, thumbnail, knuckle folds, and palm crease
final_elements.description: Dark short lines clarify the established finger guides, define one thumbnail, and add restrained crease marks.

final_elements.name: shirt cuff and comic emphasis rays
final_elements.description: A simple cuff wraps the established wrist while three short rays sit beside the raised thumb.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with golden-yellow, orange, and teal marker fills
final_elements.description: Bold black marker reinforces the existing hand, finger, cuff, and ray shapes; golden yellow fills the hand, orange accents the shadow edges, and teal fills the cuff.

frames.visible_job: Places the light wrist, palm, raised-thumb axis, and four stacked rounded finger guides inside one compact envelope at a fixed scale.
introduces: upright wrist, palm, thumb axis, and four folded-finger guides

frames.visible_job: Wraps one chunky contour around the guides, drawing only the visible palm, thumb, wrist, and outside folded-finger edges.
introduces: raised-thumb hand silhouette with visible folded fingers
requires_prior_elements: upright wrist, palm, thumb axis, and four folded-finger guides

frames.visible_job: Clarifies the four light finger divisions, then adds the thumbnail, two knuckle folds, and one palm crease inside the established silhouette.
introduces: clarified finger divisions, thumbnail, knuckle folds, and palm crease
requires_prior_elements: raised-thumb hand silhouette with visible folded fingers

frames.visible_job: Wraps a simple cuff around the established wrist and adds three short comic rays beside the existing thumb.
introduces: shirt cuff and comic emphasis rays
requires_prior_elements: raised-thumb hand silhouette with visible folded fingers

frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the existing hand, cuff, and ray shapes with visible marker texture.
introduces: thick black outline with golden-yellow, orange, and teal marker fills
requires_prior_elements: raised-thumb hand silhouette with visible folded fingers
clarified finger divisions, thumbnail, knuckle folds, and palm crease
shirt cuff and comic emphasis rays

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established outlines, crease marks, marker fills, cuff edges, and emphasis rays.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established shapes

rejection_checks: No thumb, finger contour, nail, crease, cuff, ray, outline, or color area may first appear in the final panel.
The hand must retain one upright pose, palm angle, finger overlap order, scale, and crop across every frame.
Do not finish palm detail beneath the folded-finger mass; only visible crease marks may be drawn.
Reject extra fingers, missing fingers, broken joints, face features, text, labels, sticker outlines, badge frames, or extra props.
Reject glossy vector icon art, airbrushed rendering, smooth digital gradients, or mechanically perfect symmetry.
